title: Intern GTM Engineer
descriptionHtml:
About Ether.fi

Ether.fi is one of the fastest growing fintech companies in the world. We have over $10B AUM and a team of 30 nearly all technical staff. We've been profitable day one and are focusing on building real consumer applications for millions of users.

The future we envision is true on-chain banking. Our current products — Stake, Liquid, and Cash — enable users to earn high yields and spend their digital assets in the real world with ease.

Position Overview

We are looking for a hungry, resourceful intern to contribute to our GTM efforts by automating processes and contributing to growth-oriented product development.

What You'll Do

  • Build our funnel tracking system for our iOS and Android apps (AppsFlyer, Amplitude).

  • Develop internal tools to automate lead generation and cold outreach processes.

  • Build growth-oriented features in our web and/or mobile products.

  • Instrument and optimize even-driven notification systems, referral flows and onboarding funnels.

What We're Looking For

  • You ship quality software often with little oversight

  • Comfortable working across the stack

  • Self-starter, fast learner, all the usual stuff

  • Brownie points if you have an interest in crypto, fintech, or on-chain products

Term

  • April - August (we are flexible), but there’s opportunity for an ongoing partnership if you’re a good fit.

Perks

  • Directly contribute to the growth of one of the fastest growing fintechs

  • Work closely with a small, high-output team

  • Opportunity for full-time employment
